title: Stop hook soft reminder (L1) for missing contract on decisions/pitfalls cites
description: Add post-turn soft reminder: when an assistant turn cited a decisions/pitfalls类 KB id with [recalled] tag but no contract operators or skip:<reason>, the Stop hook emits a stderr warning visible to the next model turn (system message in cc; equivalent injection in codex/cursor). Non-blocking — only nudges. Type resolution uses idTypeMap snapshot read from .fabric/agents.meta.json (already maintained by knowledge-meta-builder).

files.target: Stop hook reminder section (extends existing fabric-hint reminder logic)
files.change: After parseCiteLine + event write, for each cite_id with tag='recalled' AND empty operators[] AND null skip_reason: lookup id type via .fabric/agents.meta.json knowledge_type field; if type ∈ ['decisions','pitfalls'] → append reminder string '⚠ KB: <id> cited as [recalled] but missing contract; add `→ edit:<glob>` or `→ skip:<reason>` next turn' to hook stderr. Reminders aggregated per turn (one line per offending id). Skip emit if no offenders.

Test cases: (1) decisions cite with operators → no reminder; (2) decisions cite without contract → reminder emitted; (3) pitfalls cite with skip:sequencing → no reminder (skip counts as satisfied); (4) models cite without contract → no reminder (type-routed out); (5) recalled but unresolved id → no reminder (cannot type-check, defer to doctor); (6) multiple offenders → multi-line reminder; (7) non-recalled tag → no reminder. ≥8 cases total.

implementation: Read packages/cli/templates/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs to locate existing reminder/stderr emission patterns.
Define helper readAgentsMetaForType(projectRoot): parses .fabric/agents.meta.json, returns Map<stable_id, knowledge_type>. Cache result per hook invocation.
After event write, iterate cite_ids/cite_tags/cite_commitments index-aligned: check if (tag==='recalled' AND empty commitment) AND (type ∈ ['decisions','pitfalls']) → append reminder line.
Emit reminders via existing stderr channel; preserve existing reminder pipeline if present.
Create fabric-hint-reminder.test.ts with mocked agents.meta.json + transcript fixtures.
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test fabric-hint-reminder` to confirm green.

reference.pattern: Stop hook reminder injection (existing in fabric-hint.cjs)
reference.examples: Existing fabric-hint emits archive-opportunity reminders on Stop; rc.24 extends with contract-missing reminders.

rationale.chosen_approach: Reuse existing Stop hook reminder pipeline. Type check via agents.meta.json which hooks already read for other purposes (zero new I/O cost).
alternatives_considered: PreToolUse blocking (rejected: violates B2 L3+L1 lock + rc.20 non-blocking 总则)
Doctor-only audit (rejected: no feedback loop, model never learns within session)
rationale.tradeoffs: Reminder visibility depends on client (cc shows stderr as system message; codex/cursor behavior may vary). Acceptable for soft enforcement.

manual_checks: Manually trigger Stop hook on transcript with cite missing contract → verify stderr reminder
Verify type routing: models cite without contract → no reminder
success_metrics: No reminder false positives on models/guidelines/processes types

criteria: Reminder NOT emitted when cite_commitments has operators or skip_reason
Commit msg: 'feat(rc24): Stop hook soft reminder for missing contract on decisions/pitfalls (TASK-05)'
